Note: You must be logged in to your Owner account to access this form. Free Claude users Free Claude.ai users have access to: All help documentation All help documentation Fin, our AI support bot Fin, our AI support bot Account deletion support in cases where self-serve is unavailable Account deletion support in cases where self-serve is unavailable To get support: Log in to your Claude.ai account. Log in to your Claude.ai account. Click your initials or name in the lower left corner. Click your initials or name in the lower left corner. Select "Get help." Select "Get help." Use the support messenger to: Search help resources. Chat with Fin, our AI support bot. Use the support messenger to: Search help resources. Search help resources. Chat with Fin, our AI support bot. Chat with Fin, our AI support bot. Unable to log in? If you can't access your account, we can still help with: Account deletion Account deletion Data exports Data exports Subscription support Subscription support To request assistance: Click the message icon in the lower right corner of the Help Center. Click the message icon in the lower right corner of the Help Center. Start a conversation. Start a conversation. Select "I can't login." Select "I can't login." About subscription support If you're a paid subscriber having trouble accessing your account, our team can: Help locate login information Help locate login information Process subscription cancellations Process subscription cancellations Check refund eligibility Check refund eligibility Note: In order to assist with these tasks, we will need to validate details about your account and the payment method used. Designated point of contact for users in the EU Users in the EU can find instructions on how to find the single point of contact for users in the EU under the DSA here . Report compliance concerns - UK and Australian users Users in the UK can find instructions to report non-compliance with UK OSA duties here . This includes reporting related to illegal content safety duties, content reporting obligations, freedom of expression and privacy, or the use of proactive technology by Anthropic in breach of Anthropic’s Terms of Service.
